title: malvastrum fragrans
intro: Malvastrum fragrans, commonly known as "Hollywood Jasmine," is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems. The therapeutic actions of Malvastrum fragrans include its ability to calm the nervous system, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a good night's sleep. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
parts: Malvastrum fragrans has many medicinal parts, such as its roots, leaves, and flowers. The roots of Malvastrum fragrans contain medicinal constituents like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been used to treat inflammatory conditions. The leaves of the plant contain medicinal constituents like alkaloids and glycosides, which have been used to treat fever and digestive issues. The flowers of Malvastrum fragrans contain medicinal constituents like saponins and terpenoids, which have been used to treat respiratory issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent.
preparations: Malvastrum fragrans has many herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, that have been used for various medicinal purposes. For instance, teas made from the plant are often used to treat digestive issues, such as bloating and cramps, while also being used to soothe respiratory problems like bronchitis and coughs. Tinctures, on the other hand, are commonly used to relieve pain and reduce inflammation, and are also used to treat fever and skin conditions. Additionally, infusions of the plant are often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress, making it a popular choice for those looking for a natural remedy for anxiety and insomnia.
side_effects: Malvastrum fragrans can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues in some individuals. Prolonged use of the plant's extracts or essential oil may lead to headaches, dizziness, and nausea. In severe cases, improper use of Malvastrum fragrans can also cause digestive problems, including stomach cramps, diarrhea, and vomiting. Additionally, the plant's interaction with certain medications may exacerbate underlying health conditions, such as high blood pressure and asthma.
